Event: Great Samurai Challenge
Event Date: 01/10/2021
Sage Bot Item Code: AR69


Other locations the gear can be found

Mystic Dragon
Shinobi equipment

Once in a while, the fighter hides in the shadows and their body becomes translucent for 3 sec. Additionally increasing dodge by 70%, and the crit by 70%. While the fighter is hidden in the shadows, once in a while, after a critical hit, he throws a kunai at the enemy, dealing 15000 damage and making enemy lose their balance. They cannot dodge or deal critical damage for 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
